overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a guided tour of the Sanctuary of Isthmia at night. The player character approaches a classical Greek temple, enters the cella to view the colossal cult statue, then exits to explore the courtyard with a reflecting pool and bronze monuments.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Greek sanctuary exterior with monumental bronze statue

events.description: beginning approach to the Sanctuary of Isthmia temple complex at night

agents.ego_description: walking toward the temple entrance, passing the bronze spear statue on the right

entered.detail: large bronze statue of a warrior holding a spear aloft on a stone pedestal
classical Greek temple with tall Doric columns and red banners
wide stone steps leading up to the temple entrance
abandoned wooden cart with wheels near the temple columns

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on the exterior of the Sanctuary of Isthmia at night, with a large bronze warrior statue visible to the right. The camera approaches the temple entrance across stone paving, passing a wooden cart and ascending the stairs toward the columned portico.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple entrance portico with massive Doric columns

events.description: entering the temple through the columned portico
moving from moonlit exterior into torch-lit interior entrance hall

agents.ego_description: walking through the temple entrance, passing between massive stone columns into the interior

entered.detail: covered entrance area with massive fluted Doric columns
decorated doorway leading to the inner sanctuary
ornate wooden lattice panels on the interior walls

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the temple's columned portico, transitioning from the cool night air to the torch-lit interior. Passing through the massive doorway, the decorative lattice screens and inner sanctum entrance become visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple cella with colossal cult statue and painted walls

events.description: entering the main sanctuary chamber with the cult statue
approaching the colossal statue and tilting camera upward to view the full height

agents.ego_description: walking up the central aisle toward the massive cult statue, examining the painted walls and ceiling

notable_agents.action: standing near the statue base, facing the cult image

entered.detail: massive marble cult statue of a robed figure holding a spear and flame, standing on a raised platform
elaborate red and blue painted murals depicting figures and patterns on the upper walls
bronze incense burners suspended from the ceiling beams
low stone table with ritual items and vessels placed before the statue

segments.scene_description: Inside the temple cella, the camera approaches the colossal marble cult statue dominating the space. The walls feature elaborate painted friezes in red and blue, while hanging braziers provide warm illumination. An NPC stands near the statue base as the camera tilts upward to appreciate the statue's scale.

scene_state.functional_zone: exiting the inner sanctuary through entrance hall

events.description: turning around and beginning exit from the inner sanctuary
approaching the exit, moonlight becomes visible through the doorway

agents.ego_description: turning away from the statue and walking back out through the temple entrance

entered.detail: the temple entrance now viewed from inside, framing the night sky
the columned entrance area seen from the interior perspective

segments.scene_description: The camera turns away from the cult statue and proceeds back through the temple interior. Moving toward the exit, the lighting transitions from warm torchlight to the cool blue moonlight visible through the doorway, passing back through the portico columns.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple courtyard with reflecting pool and bronze guardian statues

events.description: exiting the temple into the open courtyard with the reflecting pool

agents.ego_description: walking around the courtyard, examining the reflecting pool and bronze statues

notable_agents.action: group of figures gathered on the temple steps ahead

entered.detail: rectangular pool of still water reflecting the temple and sky
pair of bronze warrior statues flanking the courtyard entrance
central stone altar structure at the top of the courtyard steps
trees with pink blossoms lining the courtyard edges

segments.scene_description: Having exited the temple, the camera explores the open courtyard featuring a rectangular reflecting pool in the center. Bronze guardian statues stand at the perimeter, while flowering trees with pink blossoms line the edges. A group of NPCs can be seen gathered on the distant temple steps.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the moonlit exterior of the Sanctuary of Isthmia into the torch-lit depths of a temple before returning to an open courtyard. It begins by approaching the temple entrance across stone paving, passing a bronze warrior statue and a wooden cart before ascending the stairs toward the columned portico. As the camera passes through the massive doorway, the cool night air gives way to a warm, torch-lit interior where it advances toward a colossal marble cult statue surrounded by painted red and blue friezes. The scene then shifts as the camera turns away from the statue and retreats through the inner sanctum, with the lighting transitioning from golden firelight back to the deep blue of the moonlight. Finally, the camera emerges from the portico to explore a wide courtyard featuring a central reflecting pool, bronze guardian statues, and flowering pink trees.
